prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: child-friendly foreground effect overlay for scenes 4 and 5
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: one complete compact cluster of small orange and cinnabar paper-cut flames with two rounded blue-gray opaque paper smoke curls; decorative handcrafted shapes, not realistic fire
Style/medium: layered torn rice-paper collage matching Image 1
Composition/framing: compact lower-corner effect with crisp fully visible edges and generous padding
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: gentle non-threatening scale, no people, no building, no text, no logo, no watermark; smoke must be opaque paper shapes; do not use #00ff00 in subject
